rationale.why_roc_auc_only: ROC-AUC is threshold-independent — it measures how well the model ranks churners above non-churners across all possible thresholds. This keeps model comparison fair and separate from the deployment threshold decision.
rationale.where_recall_matters: Recall and precision depend on the decision threshold, which is a scoring-time decision. The scoring pipeline applies threshold optimization (recall-targeted) when generating predictions.
